title: Package directory layout
raw_claude_review_text:
Verdict: PASS

Findings:
- [P2] scripts/validate-rp00-control-plane-contract.mjs:~10303 - The old registry-nextSubphase check was retained but gated behind currentContractSubphaseId === humanApprovalValidationHelperSubphaseId. Since currentContractSubphaseId is now RP00.P01.M06.S01 and humanApprovalValidationHelperSubphaseId is RP00.P01.M05.S11, that branch is unreachable dead code. Impact: no functional effect, but misleading leftover scaffolding. Fix: delete the gated block; the later unconditional S02 assertion fully covers it.
- [P2] packages/control-plane/src/model.js:1402 / test/model.test.js:148 - assertControlPlaneSyntheticFixtureSetLayout and the unit test do not assert targetFiles/targetTests content, allowedNamespacePrefixes, allowedDomains, or nextSubphase. Impact: low; contract validator covers some values, but model target files/tests could silently drift. Fix: add deepEqual on targetFiles/targetTests and direct prefix/domain/nextSubphase checks.

Residual risk: Low. Slice is layout-only and internally consistent across model, registry, contract definition, fixture record, README, and validator; all nextSubphase/no_real_data/writes_product_state/marker/domain/prefix/future-subphase values agree.

findings.title: Remove unreachable HumanApproval registry-nextSubphase check
findings.details: Claude noted the old gated S11 registry-nextSubphase check is permanently unreachable now that currentContractSubphaseId is RP00.P01.M06.S01.
findings.recommendation: Delete the stale block and rely on the S01 registry nextSubphase assertion for RP00.P01.M06.S02.
findings.evidence: scripts/validate-rp00-control-plane-contract.mjs no longer contains the stale HumanApproval registry-nextSubphase branch; the S01 block asserts registry nextSubphase RP00.P01.M06.S02.

findings.title: Strengthen unit/helper parity for fixture set layout fields
findings.details: Claude noted targetFiles, targetTests, allowedNamespacePrefixes, allowedDomains, and nextSubphase were not directly asserted at the unit/helper layer.
findings.recommendation: Add direct helper and unit checks for target file/test surfaces, allowed prefixes/domains, and nextSubphase.
findings.evidence: packages/control-plane/src/model.js assertControlPlaneSyntheticFixtureSetLayout and packages/control-plane/test/model.test.js now validate target files/tests, fixture file, namespace prefixes, domains, and next boundary.

P2.title: Strengthen unit/helper parity for fixture set layout fields
